name: California CSLB Master List of Licensed Contractors
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official data portal before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: The master file includes currently renewed licenses and expired licenses that remain renewable; it excludes cancelled, revoked, and nonrenewable licenses.
This adapter does not model companion files such as personnel, bond, or workers' compensation data.
rateLimitNotes: The official data portal exposes a direct master CSV download. Network retrieval is not implemented and future support must remain opt-in.
publicRecordsNotes: The local-file adapter is validated against the official master CSV columns. Generated dataset redistribution is not assumed to be allowed.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: CSLB provides a direct master-license CSV and separate companion files. The adapter accepts local CSV/XLSX master files but does not download or join companion files.
researchNotes: The master CSV header and representative rows were checked against the official download. Companion personnel, bond, and workers' compensation files remain outside this adapter.
maintainerNotes: Keep the fixture adapter scoped to license-master concepts; do not infer companion-file compliance facts.
verificationCaveats: California CSLB mapping is validated against the official master-license CSV columns; fixture rows remain hand-authored.
CSLB companion files and instant license lookup may contain source details that are not represented by this fixture.
No matching record means no match in this source at the checked time, not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
verificationNotes: Local master-file verification supports matched, not-found, ambiguous duplicate, and invalid-input outcomes. Status and classification mapping remain conservative and preserve CSLB source caveats.

researchEvidence.note: Official portal coverage text, direct master CSV header, and representative row shape reviewed.
